system.notes:
ESA-built Aries-series spaceplane (TAV); reaches low Earth orbit via jet, scramjet and rocket. Not designed for deep-space travel.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.32): Aries II · 350 · 5 · 48 · Chemical · 8 · Batteries, Fuel Cell · 50% · 3 · 30m3 · 3 · 40 · 0 · 7 · 3 · None

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 350 million eb; Crew 5; Passengers 48; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 8; Power Type Batteries, Fuel Cell; Sensors 50%; Computers 3; Cargo 30m3; Actions 3; Weapon Spaces 40; Armor (max SP) 0; Damage Points 7; Overkill Points 3; Shuttlecraft None.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
